to_date.text: สิ้นสุดวันที่เริ่มสัญญา

root.sql: select sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract , extract(year from sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract)+543 year_begining_of_contract , sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no , sc_lon_m_contract.loan_type , pka_com_function.fp_get_member_name(sc_lon_m_loan_card.membership_no) as member_name , sc_lon_m_loan_card.membership_no , sc_lon_m_contract.ending_of_contract , sc_lon_m_loan_card.principal_balance , current_date , '!to_date!' as to_date from sc_lon_m_loan_card , sc_lon_m_contract where sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no and sc_lon_m_loan_card.principal_balance > '0' and sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract <= '!to_date!' /*WHERE*/ --and sc_lon_m_loan_card.membership_no = '036246' --and sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_contract_no = 'ส002534/54' order by sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract , sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no
